fork_status_and_schedule.highlight: Hegotá headliner decision delayed 2 weeks; default remains no headliner
Non-headliner proposal window opens next call; deadlines TBD

devnet_updates.highlight: bal-devnet-2: Erigon fixing sync issues; benchmarking shows prefetch slower than no-prefetch
bal-devnet-3: Most clients not ready for EIP-8037; testing release 5.4.0 available
epbs-devnet-0: Stable for 1 week; Lighthouse, Lodestar, Prysm working; second EL client needed

eip_8037_concerns.highlight: EIP-8037 complexity raised: 4 gas flavors misaligned; needs coherent multidimensional gas approach
Proposal to align EIP-7928 and EIP-8037 state gas accounting for coherence
Repricing breakout next Wednesday to address EIP-8037 simplification options
bal-devnet-3 to proceed with EIP-8037 as-is for practical testing

frame_transactions_debate.highlight: Besu shifted from Lucid preference to no headliner; Nethermind team split
Txpool complexity main concern; champions propose tunable implementation scope
Frame transactions enable native AA + FOCIL synergy for censorship resistance
Post-quantum urgency: DAO migrations need 2028-2029 timeline, frame tx enables path
Transaction assertions (security feature) depends on frame transactions as foundation

organizational.highlight: SSZ for Engine API as non-consensus change supported by multiple clients

action_items.action: Develop prototype txpool rules and integrate into EIP-8141 specification
Attend repricing breakout next Wednesday to discuss EIP-8037 simplification
Champions shore up client support over next 2 weeks via clarification and prototyping

Lucid rejected as Hegotá headliner candidate
